title: campanula macrorhiza subsp. angustiflora
intro: Campanula macrorhiza subsp. angustiflora, also known as tall bellflower, is a plant species belonging to the bellflower family (Campanulaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Campanula macrorhiza subsp. angustiflora include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and act as an antiseptic, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Campanula macrorhiza subsp. angustiflora can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be effectively utilized.
